verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Troubles may fall like showers of rain, Leaving my soul with heartache and pain, But I have a refuge, a blessed retreat, Wonderful pray'r time at the saviors dear feet.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll fly away on the wings of pray'r, I'll fly away leave my trouble and care; Jesus is waiting, my burdens to share, I'll fly away on the wings of pray'r.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O, what a joy to whispers His name, Stand on His word, His promises claim, New courage he gives me, refreshment is there, O, what a blessing, that sweet moment of pray'r.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll fly away on the wings of pray'r
